title: Rust lichen-coap block.rs: size_to_szx edge case at size=16
description: In rust/lichen-coap/src/block.rs, size_to_szx() was refactored from a match statement to 'if size < 16 { return 0; } ((size.ilog2() as u8).saturating_sub(4)).min(6)'. For size=16: ilog2(16)=4, 4-4=0, min(6)=0. This is correct (SZX 0 = 16 bytes). For size=15: returns 0. For size=17: ilog2(17)=4, 4-4=0. This means sizes 16-31 all return SZX 0, same as the original. The refactor is correct but added a test would verify this.
